Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Let's now take a look at adding waypoints to formations. As before, make sure you have the Lütjens selected, and then give the formation a new waypoint somewhere off to the west (approximately bearing 270).
Once you give the waypoint order to Lütjens, all ships will turn to follow the formation leader. Note: when giving a formation new waypoints, always give the waypoint only to the Formation Leader!
